trivia_bullets.text: Psychic Strike is a Dimir guild card from Gatecrash (February 2013), the second set in the Return to Ravnica block. Gatecrash focused on five guilds not covered in Return to Ravnica: Dimir, Orzhov, Simic, Gruul, and Boros. The card carries a Dimir watermark.

Flavor text: 'Until more information could be gleaned about Niv-Mizzet's intentions, Lazav took every opportunity to stall his experiments.' Lazav is the Dimir shapeshifting guildmaster who plots against Niv-Mizzet. The Wizards Planeswalker's Guide to Gatecrash describes Lazav as plotting to 'discern the dragon's hidden endgame.'

Psychic Strike has only one printing in the entire game -- it was never reprinted in any subsequent set. The Dimir watermark and the counterspell+mill combination encode the guild's dual identity as spy-network and memory-thief.

Legal in Pauper, PauperCommander, Modern, Legacy, Pioneer, and Commander. EDHREC rank 8,765 indicates limited Commander adoption; the 3-mana counter-plus-mill-2 rate is outcompeted in Commander by cheaper or more impactful counters. The Pauper legality gives it a home in budget Dimir control builds.

related_cards.name: Lazav, Dimir Mastermind
related_cards.note: Named character in the flavor text; the Dimir guildmaster whose espionage operation the strike serves

related_cards.name: Thought Erasure
related_cards.note: Later Dimir discard+surveil spell; thematic successor to the mind-wiping function

related_cards.name: Glimpse the Unthinkable
related_cards.note: Canonical Dimir mill spell; paired with counters in Dimir mill strategies
